home.title: AI vehicle diagnostics
home.subtitle: Accurate OBD tool with modern interface, live data and AI hints without unnecessary visual noise.
home.spec2: ELM327 support via USB and Bluetooth
home.spec3: VAG full-scan via K-line: KWP1281 / KWP2000
home.spec4: Live Data in real time via WebSocket
home.spec5: AI assistant for decoding errors and symptoms

devBanner.title: Project in development
devBanner.body: We are actively working on the platform. We will definitely notify you about the release — follow updates in your personal cabinet and on the email provided during registration.
